name: Veal with Sheeps Cheese (German)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the veal meat into large cubes and fry until portions are brown in hot oil.
2. Peel and cube onions and add to meat, sautéing briefly.
3. Season well with salt and pepper. Cover and simmer for 40 minutes.
4. Peel cucumber, cut lengthwise, remove seeds, and cut into cubes.
5. Add to the meat and let simmer another 20 minutes.
6. Wash and finely chop dillweed.
7. Peel and cube tomato.
8. Crumble the cheese and mix with tomato and dill, sprinkling over meat shortly before serving.
9. Bake flat bread in the oven and serve with the meat and a good red wine.
